历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 2767 → 2580 → 8067 → 4708 → 4184. In 2023, due to a significant adjustment in the provincial control line, there was an abnormal fluctuation (the provincial control line for Liberal Arts dropped from 484 to 489, but the ranking plummeted from 2580 to 8067). In 2024, it recovered to 4708, and in 2025, it further rebounded to 4184. In the past two years, it has shown a steady upward trend, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 4184. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 31 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 28 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 27, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, indicating a slight reduction in enrollment and slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science University Ranking, it is approximately 92nd, with recent rankings fluctuating between 86 and 92, overall stable. In 2025, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving an incident regarding the professional ethics of a professor in the College of Liberal Arts, which may have a certain negative impact on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 100th, with a general evaluation, and short video exposure is relatively low. No obvious records of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, which has some relevance to the enrollment majors such as Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature, but the overall number of advantageous disciplines is relatively small.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors is polarized, with Chinese Language/Literature majors being relatively hot. In 2025, the number of History Category candidates in the province was approximately 75,641, and in 2026, approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17%, indicating a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, with a small enrollment scale in Shaanxi Province (28 History Category students in 2025), and a low proportion of cross-provincial enrollment. The geographical distance between Hunan and Shaanxi is relatively far, so regional preference factors have limited influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4184, the 2026 History Category enrollment plan reduction of 1 person (-3.6%), the increase of about 17% in provincial History Category candidates, and the somewhat negative reputation, the supply-demand elasticity calculation yields a baseline ranking of approximately 4094. Considering the intensified competition due to the significant increase in candidates, a slight upward adjustment results in a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 4124, with a range of 3624–4624.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University's medical programs in Shaanxi Province have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: in 2021, the rank was 44,660 (planned enrollment 10); in 2022, there was no separate medical data; in 2023, only Nursing (Liberal Arts) was admitted with a rank of 8,067 (planned enrollment 2); in 2024, after resuming multi-major enrollment, the rank was 40,223 (planned enrollment 9); in 2025, the rank rose sharply to 21,787 (planned enrollment 9). In 2026, the medical enrollment plan remains at 9 (Clinical Medicine 5, Preventive Medicine 2, Pharmacy 2), unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a key university under the national 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university. Located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, it is a public normal undergraduate institution. Its Medical Department (Xianjiahu Campus) has a long history of running programs, with Clinical Medicine being a five-year program. It recruits students in the undergraduate batch in Shaanxi Province, with subject requirements of first-choice Physics and second-choice Chemistry.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs nationwide has continued to rise, with increasing competition in majors such as Clinical Medicine and Preventive Medicine. The Medical Department of Hunan Normal University maintains a stable enrollment scale of 9 students in Shaanxi Province, with programs mainly including Clinical Medicine, Preventive Medicine, and Pharmacy. Changsha, as a central provincial capital city, has a certain appeal to Shaanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous upward trend in medical rankings in recent years and the stable enrollment plan, it is estimated that the minimum admission rank for Hunan Normal University's medical programs in 2026 will be approximately 21,487, with a fluctuation range of 20,987 to 21,987. Compared to 2025's rank of 21,787, this represents a slight increase (harder to enter), reflecting the sustained high popularity of medical programs.
